summary: The diff implements most of the requested requirements. REQ-108 (animated horizontal progress bars with percentage counter, glow effects) is largely implemented. REQ-109 (simplified upload with all input methods) is implemented. REQ-110 (thumbnail in Results.tsx) appears implemented per the file summary but no direct diff content for Results.tsx is shown. REQ-111 (dark premium polish) is implemented. REQ-107 has a conflict: the spec says to use circular status icons and remove horizontal progress bars, but REQ-108 says to replace those icons with horizontal bars. The implementation provides both icons AND bars. The main gap is that REQ-107 specifically calls for a footer line and app logo which are mentioned in the file summary but not directly visible in the truncated diff.

missing_requirements.requirement: App logo/brand mark must appear above the 'Analisando Gráfico' heading
missing_requirements.reason: The file summary for ProcessingScreen.tsx mentions the app logo is present, but the truncated diff does not directly show the logo element. Cannot fully confirm from diff evidence alone.

hallucinated_features.description: ProcessingStage component includes both circular status icons (spinning ring, green checkmark, dim circle) AND horizontal progress bars simultaneously in each stage row
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-107 asked for circular icons and removal of horizontal bars, while REQ-108 asked to replace the icons with horizontal bars. The implementation keeps both icons and bars together, which is a hybrid not explicitly requested by either requirement individually.
